new_classes.label_en: Other wine, other (subheading 2204 21 98) – non-PDO/PGI/Tokaj still wine in containers ≤ 2 L, n.e.s.
new_classes.label_de: Anderer Wein, anderer (Unterposition 2204 21 98) – stiller Wein ohne PDO/PGI/Tokaj in Behältnissen ≤ 2 L, a.n.g.
new_classes.definition_en: Still wine of fresh grapes (including fortified wine) in containers of 2 litres or less that is not a sparkling wine, not a semi-sparkling wine, not a Tokaj wine, and not a wine bearing a Protected Designation of Origin (PDO) or a Protected Geographical Indication (PGI), falling under CN subheading 2204 21 98. The total dry extract of the wine is characterised by non-volatile constituents including sugars, glycerol, tannins, tartaric acid, colouring matter and salts, as defined in additional notes 4 and 5 to Chapter 22.

new_classes.label_en: Non-volatile dry extract constituents quality (sugars, glycerol, tannins, tartaric acid, colouring matter, salts)
new_classes.label_de: Nichtflüchtige Trockenmassebestandteile-Eigenschaft (Zucker, Glycerin, Tannine, Weinsäure, Farbstoffe, Salze)
new_classes.definition_en: A quality borne by a wine indicating that its total dry extract includes non-volatile constituents comprising sugars, glycerol, tannins, tartaric acid, colouring matter and salts, as defined in additional note 4(A) to Chapter 22 of the CN.

coverage_explanation: The main distinguishing criteria captured are: (1) still wine of fresh grapes (not sparkling, not semi-sparkling) via subClassOf WineOfFreshGrapes2204 and complement restrictions on sibling classes; (2) container size ≤ 2 L via someValuesFrom SmallContainer; (3) not Tokaj PDO, not PDO, not PGI via complement restrictions on all named sibling subheadings; (4) non-volatile dry extract constituents (sugars, glycerol, tannins, tartaric acid, colouring matter, salts) quality introduced and attached. Gap: The precise numeric thresholds defined in additional notes 4 and 5 (e.g. specific total dry extract g/L values discriminating between the numeric sub-codes 22042111–22042198) are not fully modelled as datatype range restrictions, since the exact threshold values for code 22042198 (the residual 'other' bucket) would require the full additional-note tables which are referenced but not reproduced in the provided legal text. The 'other wine' residual character (n.e.s.) relative to codes 22042111–22042178 is captured structurally via complement restrictions on all named sibling classes already in the TBox, but the complete set of numeric dry-extract cut-off values from additional notes 4 and 5 cannot be fully encoded without those note texts.
